summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-INT-001 confirmed Rust crossbasis is 3.6x faster than R. VAL-INT-002 verified R fallback produces identical results. VAL-INT-003 confirmed crosspred Rust SE computation works correctly. VAL-INT-004 verified full pipeline equivalence between Rust and R paths (all outputs identical within 1e-10). VAL-INT-005 confirmed graceful degradation when P1 works but P2 fails.
